summary.ja: BitPredictableのLSTMモデルによると、[bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) の予測は、-1.79% と下方向に示唆されており、信頼度は89%と高い。特に、[ethereum](/coins/ethereum) と [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin) はほぼ横ばいと予測されており、予測値はそれぞれ-2.00%、-1.77%とわずかに下方向

body.en:
89% of the BitPredictable LSTM AI model's forecast confidence suggests [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) will decline by 1.79% this week, setting a bearish tone for the market. This downward prediction is mirrored in other major coins, with [ethereum](/coins/ethereum), [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin), and [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) expected to remain flat, albeit with negative predicted values. [Solana](/coins/solana) and [ripple](/coins/ripple) are forecasted to decline by 1.05% and 2.03%, respectively. 

A closer examination of the AI forecast reveals that the model's confidence levels are relatively high across all tracked coins, indicating a strong conviction in its predictions. However, the mixed signals and relatively small predicted movements suggest a potentially volatile week ahead.

## Key Signals This Week
The recent news that the [stablecoin market cap has shrunk by $10 billion since May](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/12/stablecoin-market-cap-has-shrunk-by-usd10-billion-since-may-but-analyst-sees-no-reason-to-panic) may have contributed to the bearish sentiment. Additionally, [Bitcoin slipping below $63,000 in an Asian-session leverage flush](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/13/bitcoin-slips-below-usd63-000-in-an-asian-session-leverage-flush) may have triggered a wave of sell-offs, further exacerbating the downward trend. 

The [U.S. inflation and second-quarter earnings reports](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/13/u-s-inflation-second-quarter-earnings-reports-crypto-week-ahead) are likely to be closely watched, as they may have a significant impact on the crypto market. Any unexpected developments in these reports could lead to increased market volatility.

## Trading Agent Update
The crypto-ace agent's performance this week was balanced, with 12 trades resulting in 6 wins and 6 losses. The agent's risk management strategy held firm, despite the mixed signals and volatile market conditions. The cumulative return of -2.74% and a Sharpe ratio of -8.24 indicate a challenging period for the agent. However, the win rate of 35% suggests that the agent is still capable of making profitable trades in this environment.

## What to Watch
As the week unfolds, it will be essential to monitor the [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) price, as it often sets the tone for the rest of the market. Any significant movements in [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) and [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin) will also be closely watched, as they are often seen as indicators of the overall market sentiment. The stablecoin market and its potential impact on the broader crypto market will also be an area of focus. 
This analysis is for informational purposes only.

## In the News

Bitcoin holds near $63,800 as war-driven selloff hits everything but crypto ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/13/bitcoin-holds-near-usd63-800-as-war-driven-selloff-hits-everything-but-crypto))

Signs of life?: State of Crypto ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/12/signs-of-life-state-of-crypto))

Here’s what happened in crypto today ([Cointelegraph](https://cointelegraph.com/news/what-happened-in-crypto-today?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound))
body.ja:
BitPredictableのLSTMモデルによると、[bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) の予測は、-1.79% と下方向に示唆されており、信頼度は89%と高い。特に、[ethereum](/coins/ethereum) と [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin) はほぼ横ばいと予測されており、予測値はそれぞれ-2.00%、-1.77%とわずかに下方向に傾いている。

## 注目シグナル
この週の注目すべきニュースとしては、[U.S. inflation, second-quarter earnings reports: Crypto Week Ahead](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/13/u-s-inflation-second-quarter-earnings-reports-crypto-week-ahead) があり、アメリカのインフレ率と二四半期の企業収益報告が、暗号資産市場にどのような影響を与えるかが焦点になっている。また、[Bitcoin slips below $63,000 in an Asian-session leverage flush](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/13/bitcoin-slips-below-usd63-000-in-an-asian-session-leverage-flush) では、ビットコインが63,000ドル以下に下落し、市場が売り圧力を受けていることを示唆している。

## トレードエージェントの状況
トレードエージェントの「crypto-ace」は、過去の累積リターンが-2.74%とやや下方向に推移している。勝率は35%で、合計20回の取引を行っている。シャープレシオは-8.24と低い。特に今週は6勝6敗とバランスの取れた週であったが、取引信号は混在し、リスク管理が重要であった。

## 来週のチェックポイント
来週は、[Signs of life?: State of Crypto](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/12/signs-of-life-state-of-crypto) のような記事から、暗号資産市場がどのような動きを見せるか注目される。特に、[Stablecoin market cap has shrunk by $10 billion since May, but analyst sees no reason to panic](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/12/stablecoin-market-cap-has-shrunk-by-usd10-billion-since-may-but-analyst-sees-no-reason-to-panic) のような記事から、ステーブルコイン市場の動向が注目される。

投資助言ではありません。
